PRIOR AUTHORIZATION REQUEST

Patient: Maria Santos
Date of Service: 2026-03-15
Requesting Provider: Dr. James Chen, Riverside Medical Group
Authorization #: PA-2026-44821
Procedure: MRI Lumbar Spine
Diagnosis: Chronic lower back pain (M54.5)

Clinical Notes: Patient presents with persistent lower back pain for 6 months, unresponsive to conservative treatment including physical therapy (12 sessions) and NSAIDs.

DEPARTMENT OF THE TREASURY
INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE

Notice: CP2000
Date: January 10, 2026
Tax Year: 2024

Dear John A. Mitchell,

We received information that doesn't match your 2024 tax return. Our records indicate you may owe an additional $3,245.00 in taxes.

Please review the enclosed information and respond within 30 days.

COVERAGE DETERMINATION NOTICE

Policy Number: HO-2025-889341
Insured: Patricia and Robert Williams
Coverage Type: Homeowners (HO-3)
Effective Date: June 1, 2025

Re: Claim #CLM-2026-11234

Dear Mr. and Mrs. Williams,

We have completed our review of your claim for water damage to the basement of your property at 412 Oak Street, Springfield, IL 62704. Based on our inspection conducted on February 28, 2026, we have determined that the damage is covered under your policy.
